falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if early-notifying-state vs late-notifying-state DiD on manufacturing formal-employment share shows >+1.0 pp gap at p<0.10 by 2024, robust to a state political-control control. REFUTED if gap < +0.3 pp OR collapses with political-control adjustment. PARTIAL if gap is significant but small in magnitude.
falsification_test_text: Callaway-Sant'Anna staggered DiD on Indian state panel of manufacturing formal-employment share, 2019-2024, with state and year FE plus state political-control covariate.
